programs.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programs.desc: A comics-loving couple know their new home needs a super makeover, so they're living in the basement and haven't unpacked or bought furniture; Jonathan and Drew give several spaces a modern-yet-traditional transformation and help furnish the home.

programs.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programs.desc: After good neighbors helped them through a recent health scare, a couple do not want to leave their home, but they need more storage, flow and functionality; Drew and Jonathan transform the living room and kitchen, making a master retreat.

programs.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programs.desc: Pratima and Parmjeet's big home poses an even bigger challenge for Jill as she tries to fix several glaring dysfunctions and create an in-law space.

programs.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programs.desc: Portia and Glen's crumbling character home has a tiny kitchen and only one working bathroom for their family of five.

programs.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programs.desc: Karalyn and Todd's 1960's house needs more than a renovation; Jillian must radically redesign the entire layout to keep Karalyn at home, while Todd tries to tempt them with a new house.

programs.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programs.desc: Amanda and Derek bought a huge home because of its great location and pool but they overlooked the dysfunctional rooms and bad flow.
